## Summary

- what changed
- why this change belongs in XIFty

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] relevant fixture or snapshot coverage updated
- [ ] `CAPABILITIES.json` reviewed if support claims changed
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing behavior changed

Describe anything else you verified:

## Risks Or Follow-Ups

- remaining uncertainty
- intentional out-of-scope work
- follow-up cleanup if needed
